title: Tick Control in Norwood, Bronx | $125 - $325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Norwood, Bronx. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Licensed experts, eco-friendly treatments. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Norwood residents deserve outdoor spaces free from the dangers of ticks and Lyme disease. Best Pest Control NYC delivers comprehensive tick control services tailored to Norwood's tree-lined streets, parks, and residential yards. Our proven treatments eliminate ticks at all life stages while keeping your family and pets safe.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Norwood and the greater Bronx area, we understand the unique tick pressure your neighborhood faces, especially near Woodlawn Cemetery and local green spaces. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved products and provide seasonal protection plans that fit your budget.
localContext: Norwood's proximity to Van Cortlandt Park and Woodlawn Cemetery creates ideal tick habitats in residential yards and gardens throughout the neighborhood. The area's mix of pre-war apartment buildings with gardens and single-family homes near Mosholu Parkway requires customized tick prevention strategies.

faqs.question: What does tick control service include in Norwood?
faqs.answer: Our Norwood tick control service includes a thorough property inspection, targeted application of tick treatments to high-risk areas like lawn perimeters, shrubs, and wooded edges, plus follow-up visits during peak tick season. We focus on areas where ticks typically hide while waiting for hosts.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Norwood, Bronx?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Norwood typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in May through July. However, ticks can be active any time temperatures are above freezing. We recommend starting preventive treatments in early spring before tick populations explode.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are safe for your family and pets when applied by our certified technicians. We follow strict application guidelines and can recommend pet and child-safe zones during treatment. Most products dry within 1-2 hours, after which treated areas are safe for normal use.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Norwood?
faqs.answer: Tick control services in Norwood range from $125 to $325 depending on property size, vegetation density, and treatment frequency. We offer single applications as well as seasonal packages with multiple treatments for optimal protection. Contact us for a free customized quote based on your specific yard conditions.
